title: oldenlandia fasciculata
intro: Oldenlandia fasciculata, also known as Kun Pan, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia fasciculata include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. Oldenlandia fasciculata can be prepared as a decoction by boiling its roots and stems in water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with ethanol or other solvents.
